name: csnl-paper-archive-interview
description: Per-researcher interactive interview over the CSNL paper archive. Verifies the researcher's profile, walks a pre-computed top-N queue (recent ≤5y / mid 5–10y / classic >10y), records one MCQ choice per paper, runs a meta-review every 10 answers, and pushes everything to Postgres (csnl_paper_rec.archive_*).
